# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports:
- path: compute_engine.jinja
  name: compute_engine
- path: cloudsql.jinja
  name: cloudsql
- path: cloudstorage.jinja
  name: cloudstorage
- path:loadbalancer.jinja
  name: loadbalancer
  
resources:
- name: gcp-app-stack
  type: 'compute_engine:project'
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    projectId: YOUR_PROJECT_ID
    networkName: default
    
- name: sqlInstance
  type: cloudsql.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_9_6
    settings:
      tier: db-f1-micro
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
      
- name: storageBucket
  type: cloudstorage.bucket
  properties:
    location: US
    
- name: loadBalancer
  type: loadbalancer.network
  properties:
    backendService:
      timeoutSec: '30'
      healthChecks: YOUR_HEALTHCHECK_NAME
